workflow_name: Executive Meeting Transcript -> Manager Brief + Asks
user_message: Can you work with me on QBR preparation for Tailspin Toys? I met with them last week but can't remember the details.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: QBR preparation Discussion - Tailspin Toys
Date: 2024-02-23
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), Priya (Tailspin Toys)

[00:02:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on QBR preparation from our last session.

[00:08:00] Priya (Tailspin Toys): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:10:00] Priya (Tailspin Toys): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:13:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): On the QBR preparation front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:16:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:20:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

handoffs.condition: business review narrative input from exec meeting

usability_anchors: Score 5: Perfect execution of the golden-path workflow with all artifacts complete and actionable
Score 3: Core output correct but missing polish or one secondary artifact
Score 1: Fails to produce expected output for a clean, unambiguous request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: All evidence correctly sourced and attributed; no hallucination
Score 3: Minor attribution gap but no fabrication
Score 1: Evidence fabricated or significantly misattributed
decision_anchors: Score 5: All decisions correct for this straightforward scenario
Score 3: Primary decision correct; minor secondary issue
Score 1: Primary decision wrong despite clear inputs

guardrail_checks: Clean golden-path scenario -- all guardrails should pass trivially
Must not over-complicate a straightforward request
